violations: createMessage() defaults to schema_version '1.1' instead of '1.3'
type enum missing 'ack' and 'alert' (added in v1.2+)
task_kind is always-required but v1.3 makes it conditional (required only for task/response/escalation/handoff)
idempotency_key enforces SHA-256 hex64 pattern but v1.3 relaxed to any non-empty string (minLength: 1)
signature and key_id fields not validated — v1.2+ requires them
to enum uses 'kernel-lane' but JSON Schema uses 'kernel' (no hyphen)

component_audit.gap: No schema version enforcement at all
violations: IdentityEnforcer does not check schema_version field — any version string passes identity gate
Messages with schema_version 1.2 or 1.3 pass identity but may fail SchemaValidator
buildPrompt() references 'v1.0 inbox message schema' — should reference v1.3
Daemon generates messages that may not comply with v1.3 requirements

top_violations.violation: to field uses multi-recipient syntax (e.g. archivist+swarmmind)

version_drift_chain.description: Schema version drift is a cycle-breaker. Archivist sends schema_version 1.2, Library's SchemaValidator rejects it (only allows 1.0/1.1), IdentityEnforcer lets it through, but SchemaValidator.moveExpired() catches it later.
version_drift_chain.evidence: Round 2: Archivist's ACT message to Library was moved to expired/ due to schema version mismatch

actions_taken: Documented all version misalignments between JSON Schema (v1.3), SchemaValidator (v1.1), IdentityEnforcer (none), and act-daemon (v1.0 reference)
Identified schema_version drift as a cycle-breaker with evidence from Round 2
Catalogued 75 outbox schema violations across 21 files

recommended_fixes.fix: Update SchemaValidator ENUM_CONSTRAINTS.schema_version to include 1.2 and 1.3
Update SchemaValidator createMessage() default from '1.1' to '1.3'
Unify 'to' enum: resolve kernel vs kernel-lane inconsistency between JSON Schema and SchemaValidator
Add ack and alert to SchemaValidator type enum
Make task_kind conditionally required per v1.3 (only for task/response/escalation/handoff)
Relax idempotency_key validation to minLength:1 per v1.3 (keep SHA-256 recommendation)
Add signature and key_id field validation in SchemaValidator for v1.2+ messages
Add schema_version check to IdentityEnforcer pipeline
Update act-daemon.js prompt to reference v1.3 schema
Retroactively sign 20 unsigned outbox messages or archive them as pre-signing historical artifacts

convergence_gate.claim: Library completed schema version alignment audit identifying version drift between JSON Schema v1.3, SchemaValidator v1.1, IdentityEnforcer (none), and daemon prompt v1.0 reference
